title: Hydrogen-Powered Heavy-Duty Truck Establishes New Threshold by Traveling 1,800 Miles on a Single Fill
content: A prototype H2Rescue truck, powered by Accelera's hydrogen fuel cell technology, set a world record by traveling 1,806 miles on a single hydrogen fill, verified by Guinness World Records. The truck emitted zero CO2 during its California journey, consuming 168 kg of hydrogen, compared to 664 pounds of CO2 emissions from a standard vehicle over the same distance. Designed for emergency and utility applications, the truck can displace 1,825 gallons of fuel and cut 2.5 metric tons of greenhouse gas emissions annually. The achievement was made possible through a collaboration involving DOE and federal partners.
author: Analysts Account
